raw_input: Write release notes (60–100 words) for version 2.4.0 of an internal dashboard tool. Facts to convey: (a) new features — CSV export on all chart views, and dark mode; (b) fixed — timezone bug that caused chart timestamps to be one hour off during DST transitions; (c) breaking change — the /api/v1/metrics endpoint is removed; clients must migrate to /v2/metrics. Structure: one short intro sentence, then sections labeled 'New:', 'Fixed:', 'Breaking:' with plain-text prose (no bullets or markdown lists). Audience: internal engineering team.
success_criteria: both new features, the DST fix, and the /v2/metrics migration are all mentioned
plain prose after each label, not bullet lists
constraints: no markdown bullets (- or *) or headers (#)
